step_rationale: Renal function and cardiorenal stress marker; prognostic indicator independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Cystatin C reflects glomerular filtration and renal function; elevated levels indicate cardiorenal risk and mortality in acute coronary syndrome.
